description: Storyblok CLI v4.14.0 stories pull stores files under .storyblok/stories/{spaceId}/*.json as flat JSON files (not nested by slug). The --starts-with flag filters by full_slug prefix. All 590 DK stories pulled successfully with dk/ prefix filter.
content:
storyblok_cli_pull:
  command: 'storyblok stories pull --space <SPACE_ID> --starts-with dk/ --path .storyblok'
  cli_version: '4.14.0'
  output_structure: '.storyblok/stories/{spaceId}/*.json'
  file_naming: '{slug}_{uuid}.json'
  story_format: 'flat JSON object (not wrapped in story key)'
  note: 'extractFromDirectory needs resolveStoriesDir() to auto-discover spaceId subdir'

description: Fresh DK story census from pull on 2026-02-19. 590 total stories (41 folders, 549 non-folder). 174 editorial pages (133 page + 39 article + 1 home + 1 store_locator). All published 2026-02-18, reflecting Story 4.15 and 4.17 changes.
content:
dk_story_census_2026_02_19:
  pull_date: '2026-02-19'
  total: 590
  folders: 41
  by_component:
    push_card: 246
    page: 133
    link: 47
    article: 39
    faq_item: 29
    key_facts_item: 25
    testimonial_item: 23
    news_category: 2
    home: 1
    contact_bubble: 1
    store_locator: 1
    header: 1
    footer: 1
  editorial_pages: 174
  pages_with_body: 167
  pages_without_body: 5
  all_published_at: '2026-02-18'

description: Updated dk/ story count: was '18 stories total under dk/' post-deletion, now 590 after Story 4.15/4.17 leaf content population re-pushed all content. PIM content (dk/produkter/) still present among the 590.
content: pim_preserved note update: 'dk/ now has 590 stories total after Story 4.15/4.17 content population'
